raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.0,"RX.5":0.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'make this stronger' refer primarily to improving the writing style and flow, or to strengthening the scientific arguments and claims?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation implies ensuring logical consistency to strengthen the overall argument chain in the draft.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is central to improving the narrative arc and making the section more compelling.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing given the artifact's run-on sentences, tense inconsistencies, and flow issues that weaken its presentation.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to credibly strengthening claims without misleading the reader.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure any strengthening of the text maintains scientific integrity.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to focusing the strengthening efforts within the described framework and evaluation.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is a cross-cutting concern to prevent potential misuse of the control framework, though not explicitly requested.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability ensure the origins of claims and updates are clear, supporting stronger attribution."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'make this stronger' refer primarily to improving the writing style and flow, or to strengthening the scientific arguments and claims?

rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies ensuring logical consistency to strengthen the overall argument chain in the draft.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is central to improving the narrative arc and making the section more compelling.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing given the artifact's run-on sentences, tense inconsistencies, and flow issues that weaken its presentation.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to credibly strengthening claims without misleading the reader.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure any strengthening of the text maintains scientific integrity.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to focusing the strengthening efforts within the described framework and evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a cross-cutting concern to prevent potential misuse of the control framework, though not explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability ensure the origins of claims and updates are clear, supporting stronger attribution.
